summary: FREE11 Engagement Features (Phase 8) - Full backend + frontend testing. All 24 backend tests PASS. All 5 engagement features functional in frontend. 2 minor bugs found.

minor.issue: engagement_engine.py line 55: `len(set())` always returns 0 — total_participants field is always 0 in response. Should sum predictions or count unique users.

ui_bugs.issue: Line 250: `user?.prediction_streak || 0` displayed as Accuracy% — `prediction_streak` is consecutive correct count (integer), not accuracy percentage. Should use `Math.round((user?.correct_predictions / user?.total_predictions || 0) * 100)`.

integration_issues.issue: Set as Goal button NOT testable in current environment: all Level 1 accessible products (≤100 coins) can be afforded by new users with welcome bonus (50 coins + puzzle reward). All expensive products (>100 coins) require Level 2+, so meetsLevelRequirement=false for new users. The code is correct; data setup prevents testing this path.

Modal cannot be triggered in test environment — requires is_new=True AND predictions_total>0. Admin has dismissed report (is_new=false), all users have 0 resolved predictions this week. Modal code is correct (WeeklyReportCard.js:13 shows condition), just cannot trigger in current data state.

issues: Some option labels show raw prediction values (e.g. 'value_4', 'value_1') instead of human-readable names — test data quality issue, not a code bug

feature_test_results.F1_wishlist_backend: PASS - POST pin, GET with progress/coins_needed/coins_balance, DELETE unpin all working
feature_test_results.F1_wishlist_ui: PASS - WishlistGoal widget visible on Dashboard with empty CTA and pinned product states, progress bar, redeem/unpin buttons all functional
feature_test_results.F2_streak_backend: PASS - Returns {streak, multiplier, hot_hand} with correct logic (streak>=7→4x, >=5→3x, >=3→2x, else 1x)
feature_test_results.F2_hot_hand_ui: PASS - Banner correctly hidden when streak=0, code verified to show when streak>=3
feature_test_results.F3_crowd_meter_backend: PASS - Public endpoint, correct structure with total_predictions, options with count+pct
feature_test_results.F3_crowd_meter_ui: PASS - CrowdMeter component renders on /match/94722 with live prediction bars
feature_test_results.F4_puzzle_backend: PASS - GET today returns question/options/already_answered/rewards; POST answer correct (is_correct=true, coins_earned=25); idempotency (2nd call returns already_answered=true); wrong answer (is_correct=false, coins_earned=0); coins in ledger
feature_test_results.F4_puzzle_ui: PASS - DailyPuzzle widget on Dashboard with 4 options, admin already_answered result shown with explanation
feature_test_results.F5_report_card_backend: PASS - GET returns all required fields; POST dismiss sets is_new=false; new user gets report
feature_test_results.F5_report_card_ui: PARTIAL - Cannot trigger modal in test env (no user with is_new=true AND predictions_total>0), code verified correct

action_items: FIX (LOW): engagement_engine.py:55 - `len(set())` → use `sum(v['total_predictions'] for v in meter.values())` for total_participants in crowd meter response

FIX (LOW): Dashboard.js:250 - Replace `user?.prediction_streak || 0` with calculated accuracy % e.g. `user?.total_predictions > 0 ? Math.round((user?.correct_predictions / user?.total_predictions) * 100) : 0`
CONSIDER: Add at least one Level 1 product priced 100-500 coins to make Set as Goal testable/usable for new users
critical_code_review_comments: engagement_engine.py:55 - `len(set())` is a copy-paste bug (empty set literal). Should compute total_participants from meter data.
Dashboard.js:250 - prediction_streak (int) used as accuracy % — semantically wrong field for UI label.
WeeklyReportCard correctly uses `is_new && predictions_total > 0` guard before showing modal ✅
CrowdMeter correctly polls every 10s when isLive=true ✅
Puzzle idempotency correctly handled via upsert on completions collection ✅
Wishlist pin/unpin uses proper upsert logic with $set ✅

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features render and interact correctly; 2 edge cases not testable in current data state)

seed_data_creation: Registered 3 new test users: test_eng_*@free11test.com, test_shop_goal@free11test.com, test_puzzle_123@free11test.com. Admin's wishlist was set then cleared during test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 engagement features from FREE11 Phase 8 are tested. Admin already answered today's puzzle (puzzle_wed, is_correct=false, admin answered '1 wicket per 20 balls'). Admin weekly report dismissed (is_new=false). Test users test_eng_*@free11test.com exist with puzzle answered. For Set as Goal testing, need user with Level 1 + balance < product_price (current products: cheapest 10 coins, user welcome bonus=50, so no gap for Level 1). CrowdMeter on match 94722 has live data with several prediction types.

total_participants_bug.root_cause: Copy-paste bug - `len(set())` creates an empty set literal instead of a set populated with user IDs or prediction IDs. Result is always 0.
total_participants_bug.fix: Replace `len(set())` with `sum(v['total_predictions'] for v in meter.values())` to show total prediction count, or add user_id to aggregation pipeline and collect unique user IDs.
total_participants_bug.severity: LOW - doesn't break functionality, just shows wrong count

accuracy_display_bug.root_cause: `user?.prediction_streak` (consecutive wins count) displayed as accuracy %. `streak_days` is login streak, `prediction_streak` is consecutive correct predictions count - both are integers not percentages.
accuracy_display_bug.severity: LOW - shows 0% for most users (when prediction_streak=0), coincidentally correct
